titleStmt.title: SII 24.208: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 208. (A.R. No. 12 of 1936-37.) NORTH WALL OF THE THIRD PRĀKĀRA (INSIDE), TO THE WEST OF THE SVARGA-VĀŚAL-GŌPURA.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase, for rearing a flower-garden for supplying flowers to god Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-Perumāḷ, by Āsūri Śrī Lakshma- bhaṭṭa-Sōmayāji of Kaṇṇuḍai-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam, a subdivision of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, one of the bhaṭṭas of the Śrīpādasēva group of (appointed by ?) Perumāḷ Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva. The record is dated in the 15th year, on the 21st day of Āvaṇi, of Jaṭāvarmaṉ Tribhuvanachakravartin Sundara Pāṇḍyadēva who may be identified with Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundara Pāṇḍya II, whose 15th year of reign corresponds to A.D. 1290-91.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku yāṇṭu [10 5] vatu
Āvaṇi mātam 2 10 1 tiyati nāḷ perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevar śrīpātasevai paṇṇum bhaṭṭakaḷil Irā[ja*]rā[ja*] vaḷanāṭṭu pāccil kūṟṟattu kaṇṇuṭaiccaruppetimaṅkalattu
Āsūri śrīlakṣma bhaṭṭasomayājiyār Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukku ceṅkaḻunir tirumālaiyum śatapatri karumukai Uḷḷiṭṭa nāṟu tiruppaḷḷitāmaṅkaḷ
nityasiddhamāka cātti Aruḷuvatāka Innāṭṭu tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaccaruppetimaṅkalattile tiruvoṭaiyum tirunantavaṉa
mumāka Āyiram kuḻiyāl Arai nilamum koṇṭu tiruvoṭaikaḷum tirunantavaṉamum Ākkiṉapaṭikku Ittiruvoṭaiyum tirunantavaṉamum ceyvārukku
tirunāmattukkāṇi maṉṟaccaviḷākattu teṟkil puḷiyañcuṟṟukku vaṭakku teṟkku Āṟṟaṅkaraikku vaṭakku yoganarasiṅha(t) koyilukku meṟkku nācciyār tiruttukku maṇal
iṭā kiṭakkiṟa nilattile Eṇṇūṟu kuḻiyum teṉkarai Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷan tirukkoyil cittāmaṇippaṟṟil taricākak kiṭakkiṟa nilattile teṟkaṭaiya Eḻunūṟu kuḻiyum Āka Āyirattu Ainūṟum Iṟaiyili Āka kaikkoṇṭu Ivvāyirattu Aiññūṟu
kuḻi kaikkoṇṭu tirutti Itil vakaiyum tiruvoṭaikaḷum nantavaṉamum ceykiṟavāḷukku jivaṉamāka kuṭuppārākavum niccayittu Ivaiyiṟkku kāṇi vilai koṇ
kku vaṭakaraiyil tiruvoṭaiyum tirunantavaṉamumāka koṇṭa nilattukku Irunūṟu paṇamum teṉkarait tiruttoppukaḷil maṇal(lai) taricum tiruttukiṟa nilattukku nūṟṟu Irupatu paṇamum Āka muṉṉūṟṟu Irupatu I
ppaṇam śrī paṇṭāratte Oṭukki taravukoṇṭu Ippaṭikku perumāḷ tirumukamum mahāniyokamum Eḻutivittu koḷkaiyil Inta dharmmam candrādittavat naṭappa tāka kal veṭṭi kuṭut(ta)tatu
Itu patiṉ Eṭṭumaṇṭalattil śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 24.208 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
